extracted.title: Bison XP Project-Commissioning Notice
extracted.description:
NBPL will be commissioning our compressor stations as part of the Bison XP project between now and May 1st. Stations will include Arnegard Station 4, Manning Station 5, and Glen Ullin Station 6. During this time, customers between Port of Morgan and Glen Ullin Station 6 may experience higher pressures and/or pressure swings at times.

Customers are encouraged to continue monitoring critical notices for updates.
affectedLocations: Between Port of Morgan and Glen Ullin Station 6
